summary: Academic progress tracking app with subject analysis features. Includes grade/term percentage calculations and subject-specific total marks rules.
architectural_notes: Computer Science subject has variable total marks: 20 marks for Grades 1-7, 30 marks for Grade 8

existing_features.title: In Subject Analysis, for each grade, calculate and display the average percentage of each subject across ALL terms of that grade (not just the currently selected term). This per-grade subject average should be visible alongside or below the per-term breakdown.

In Subject Analysis, also calculate and display the overall average percentage of each subject across ALL grades (not filtered by any single grade). This cross-grade subject average should be shown as a summary row or section.

new_feature_requests.summary: In subject analysis, calculate average percentage of each subject across all terms per grade, and also average percentage of each subject across all grades
Computer Science total marks is 20 for Grade 1 through Grade 7, and 30 marks only in Grade 8

Update the Computer Science total marks configuration so that: for Grades 1 through 7, Computer Science carries a total of 20 marks; for Grade 8, Computer Science carries a total of 30 marks. This must be reflected in all percentage calculations (Subject Analysis, Progress, Combined %, etc.) that use max marks for Computer Science.
